ab: muruma’ ku i zekalr mukuwa muzangiya kani imu na ma’inayan a daman.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: sawariyan mi lra ’azi marepana’u, salaw ku sare’er kanintaw.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven't seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: mena’u i imu kaninku, tu payasaw ku paekan za taramunah, zi tu pa’auway za kurisepa.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: salaw tavu’ tu sinalem na taramunah ni imu, imaran.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: sahar ku ’emau tu kurisepa ni imu, ’inava nu ’emau ta.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa's tea, it's tasted good too.

ab: kare’alriyan lra, mukasa mi iniyam i imu na vavayan demeru za kare’a’alriyan.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: demeru za sazu za kare’a’alriyan i imu ulra a vulraw, a terukuk, a siyak zi a semuli.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: piya kare’alri, mukuwa mi i sayheng kikulanga.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: melak za sazu za vurasi, za vu’ir zi za rogiyo, urungu muruma’ kema veray kaninku.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: kay ku lra kema ku zi zuwa lra muzangiya nu masalr lra ku kuwayaw na imulri.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I'd see them next time.
